_note: Pull from Thymer → Gratitude (205 total), curated on 2026-07-03. Evocative / spiritual / nature / creative lines; the most intimate, name-bearing entries are left for Anthony to add by choice.

records.title: God's love and grace and mercy.
Thanks be to GOD who grants us restorative time together
Making and encountering moments of meaning
For God, the Cre-a-tor, the Idea Giver, the Critical Pedagogue; the concepts, space, tools for new work.
the ability to work today toward getting work done, re-systemization of routines, etc.,
Road walks, the bustling sounds of birds, such as Highly Diverse Birdsong, Woosamonsa Road Harbat Farm
The 250K education I received of weird musical skills
Spaces to play, like Tana and the desk and the art table.
The joy and anticipation of friends and colleagues at work OPC Overbrook Presbyterian Church
To GOD, who is fashioning me into the person God wants me to be.
